top_signals.title: Progress urges ShareFile admins to shut down servers over “credible” threat
top_signals.summary: Progress Software is emailing ShareFile customers who use Storage Zone Controllers to immediately shut down their servers after identifying what it describes as a "credible external security threat" targeting the on-premises secure file-sharing software. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Man, 26, arrested on suspicion of murder of former Tory minister Ann Widdecombe
top_signals.summary: Devon and Cornwall Police say Widdecombe, 78, sustained ‘serious injuries’
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: License plate cameras may be next target after Supreme Court reins in location tracking
top_signals.summary: If a warrant is ultimately needed for ALPR searches, experts say, it would radically limit how the networks of cameras can be used and would change modern policing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
